llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Combine the conceptual explanation from pass_1 with the filtered list of inactive journeys from pass_2. First explain that an inactive journey in Adobe Journey Optimizer is a journey that has been stopped, closed, or has ended its scheduled run - it is no longer actively processing or enrolling new profiles. Then list all journeys from the API response that have an inactive, stopped, or closed status, showing their names and relevant details.

passes.expected_result: Conceptual explanation of inactive journey status
passes.subtask: Explain what an inactive journey means in Adobe Journey Optimizer context

passes.expected_result: List of journeys with their statuses to filter for inactive ones
passes.subtask: Retrieve list of journeys to identify those with inactive status
